results.desc: primary action exposes an accessible name ("Place order")
results.baseNote: raw visible text = "" (base L cannot compute the accessible name)

results.desc: amount field has an associated accessible label
results.baseNote: label association (for/id, aria-labelledby) is not a raw attribute-equality predicate
the announced-role (role=alert) semantics is an a11y-tree property, not DOM text
